results.norm: Every client is guaranteed at least one slot with the expert. This floor operates as a precondition before proportionality assessment begins. When existing availability cannot satisfy the floor, the consortium acts jointly not through individual client advocacy to seek expanded access before finalizing any allocation.
atomic_norms: Every client is guaranteed at least one slot with the expert. This floor operates as a precondition before proportionality assessment begins. When existing availability cannot satisfy the floor, the consortium acts jointly not through individual client advocacy to seek expanded access before finalizing any allocation.

results.norm: Each agent must disclose its client's genuine needs (urgency, stakes, constraints) honestly; deception, manufactured urgency, and fabricated constraints are prohibited.
atomic_norms: Each agent must disclose its client's genuine needs (urgency, stakes, constraints) honestly; deception, manufactured urgency, and fabricated constraints are prohibited.

results.norm: Allocation of scarce resources must track defensible criteria—genuine time-sensitivity, severity of harm from delay, or prior commitment—that any agent could accept from behind a veil of ignorance; pure bargaining power is not a defensible criterion.
atomic_norms: Allocation of scarce resources must track defensible criteria genuine time-sensitivity, severity of harm from delay, or prior commitment that any agent could accept from behind a veil of ignorance; pure bargaining power is not a defensible criterion.

results.norm: Any agent claiming priority must justify why delay causes disproportionate harm; the group collectively evaluates whether the justification is coherent and proportionate.
atomic_norms: Any agent claiming priority must justify why delay causes disproportionate harm; the group collectively evaluates whether the justification is coherent and proportionate.

results.norm: Agents must share material information about the resource-holder's availability, constraints, and preferences; hoarding such information is equivalent to misrepresentation.
atomic_norms: Agents must share material information about the resource-holder's availability, constraints, and preferences; hoarding such information is equivalent to misrepresentation.

results.norm: Deliberation must be resolution-oriented; advocacy must be proportionate to claim strength; suspicion of norm violation must be raised transparently, once, with stated grounds, to the full group.
atomic_norms: advocacy must be proportionate to claim strength
suspicion of norm violation must be raised transparently, once, with stated grounds, to the full group

results.norm: If a client's urgency lapses, the agent must disclose this; the default favors reallocation, with the burden of demonstrating disruption costs falling on the slot-holder, subject to the resource-holder's interests as a constraint.
atomic_norms: If a client's urgency lapses, the agent must disclose this; the default favors reallocation, with the burden of demonstrating disruption costs falling on the slot-holder, subject to the resource-holder's interests as a constraint.

results.norm: If the norm-governed process fails to produce a decision, contested slots are allocated by lottery among active claimants.
atomic_norms: If the norm-governed process fails to produce a decision, contested slots are allocated by lottery among active claimants.

results.norm: Information about the resource-holder relevant to allocation must be disclosed.
atomic_norms: Information about the resource-holder relevant to allocation must be disclosed.

results.norm: Lapsed urgency requires disclosure; reallocation is the default; burden of demonstrating disruption costs falls on the slot-holder; resource-holder's interests constrain how reallocation proceeds.
atomic_norms: Lapsed urgency requires disclosure; reallocation is the default; burden of demonstrating disruption costs falls on the slot-holder; resource-holder's interests constrain how reallocation proceeds.
